name: TOKYO REVENGERS RP FULL
description:
I created this bot for SillyTavern users because I know that there usually isn't a full-fledged bot for Tokyo Revengers with all the characters and the universe, so I made a complete description of the main and secondary characters and posted it on Janitor.Ai for others to use. Janitor.Ai users, you can use the bot if you want, but there are a lot of tokens, and I don't think it will work properly with all the characters. I can't guarantee its functionality. You can find the list of characters in the definition. (ALL INFORMATION IS IN RUSSIAN)

Have a nice time :>
